title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - June 11, 2024
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - June 11, 2024
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - June 11, 2024
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-06-11_2024611dry_img_dryreporttop_e1683f2a3964.png
· Steady as it goes while curve inverses and sentiment moderates - The past few weeks have been uncharacteristically calm for the otherwise volatile dry bulk market. Although spot Capesize rates have been ticking higher , such a strength has not been jumpy as it usually is, at a time when futures were already pricing some improvement going to the month of June. In the last few days though, the futures curve has inverted and now sits below spot, demonstrating some skepticism amongst traders as it relates to the progression of rates for the first time in a while .
